# Milestone 5 version 1.0A - January 5th 2021

## M5V1.0A

### About

This is the first public release of the Idle Miner Tycoon image folder for the SeanPM Life Archive project. This release contains all data from 2018 to January 5th 2021.

This is the annual 2021 release.

This release includes:

> * Images from 2018 to January 5th 2021

> * A Project Wiki

> * Basic documentation

> * Information about the first release

> * No other content included in this release
